en-US.name: Tawkit Prayer Times
en-US.summary: Islamic prayer times display for Echo Show with Hanafi Asr
en-US.description: Tawkit displays the 5 daily Islamic prayer times for Apex, NC on your Echo Show screen. Features a countdown to the next prayer, Adhan audio at prayer times, and rotating Hadiths and Quran verses. Uses Hanafi madhab for Asr calculation.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Tawkit for prayer times
Alexa, ask Tawkit what is the next prayer

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Open the skill and check that prayer times display correctly on Echo Show.
